nasb.text: They slaughtered the Passover animals, and while the priests sprinkled the blood received from their hand, the Levites skinned them.

esv.text: And they slaughtered the Passover lamb, and the priests threw the blood that they received from them while the Levites flayed the sacrifices.

cnv.text: 利未人宰了逾越節的羊羔，祭司從他們的手裡把血接過來，灑在壇上，利未人剝了祭牲的皮，

ccb.text: 利未人宰杀逾越节的羊羔，祭司从他们手中接过血，洒在坛上，又剥去祭牲的皮。
